# Thrasymachus

*459 BCE – 400 BCE · Greek*

Greek sophist from Chalcedon, known above all as the interlocutor of the first book of Plato's Republic, where he vehemently maintains that justice is nothing but the advantage of the stronger.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
